title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Luffy, Nami, Big Mom as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "army of rage" continues its relentless attack...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I got careless for a moment there... who would have thought that this little girl...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: was capable of bringing down such a ridiculous-iously huge lightning bolt.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't make such a huge thundercloud by myself, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm more than capable of manipulating the thunderclouds created by big mom...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait just a minute-ju! We didn't betray you...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It Hurds!!! Huhhhy add chill bee ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IF I WERE TO CUT YOU DOWN IN AN INSTANT, THERE'D BE NO MEANING IN KILLING YOU TO BEGIN WITH...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll kill you at the most painful and agoniz- ing speed possible...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are you kiddin' me, straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe that you were able to go toe-to-toe with big bro cracker over the course of an entire night!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The chess Barbarian army are far from pushovers! We'll crush you like the piece of trash you are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I add a little "sweetness" to my sweet fresh cream...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll simply be a matter of time before your entire body is charted to a crisp!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
